meta.description: Ensures an artifact was built from a specific repository and commit

foundInResolvedDependencies.code: has(predicate.data.buildDefinition) ? ( has(predicate.data.buildDefinition.resolvedDependencies) ? ( size(predicate.data.buildDefinition.resolvedDependencies.filter(dep, has(dep.uri) && (dep.uri == context.buildPoint || (dep.uri.startsWith(context.buildPoint + '@') && context.buildPointAllowRepo ) ) )) > 0 ) : false) : false

error.guidance: The attested build point does not match the expected commit

foundInMaterials.code: has(predicate.data.materials) && context.buildPoint.contains(':') ? predicate.data.materials.exists(d, context.buildPoint.split(':')[0] in d.digest && d.digest[context.buildPoint.split(':')[0]] == context.buildPoint.split(':')[1]) : false

error.guidance: The attested build point does not match the expected commit
